description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named puNES that runs on push to the master branch. The workflow builds puNES for Windows using a matrix strategy with different environments (x86_64 and i686) and architectures (64-bit and 32-bit). For each job, it sets up MSYS2, downloads and extracts Qt5 and DLLs, runs autogen.sh, builds D3D9 and OpenGL versions of puNES, and uploads the resulting artifacts.
